# AppointBridge

> AppointBridge is a warm-lead conversion service for independent, owner-operated dental practices in the US. When a high-ticket inquiry (dental implants, Invisalign, cosmetic, or complex restorative) arrives from a practice's own ads or website, AppointBridge contacts it within minutes and follows up across call, text, and email — with human oversight — until the patient books a confirmed appointment. Practices pay per confirmed appointment only.

## What AppointBridge is
- A done-for-you lead response and follow-up service for the inquiries a practice already generates.
- Built for independent, owner-operated practices (1–3 locations) offering high-ticket services.
- Priced per confirmed booking. The first two pilot practices pay $100 per confirmed booking and nothing else.
- HIPAA-aware and TCPA-conscious: a Business Associate Agreement is signed before any patient-adjacent data is accessed, and patient messaging respects required contact-time rules.

## What AppointBridge is NOT
- Not a lead generation service. Practices source their own leads through their own ads and forms.
- Not a marketing or SEO agency.
- Not a medical service. It gives no medical or clinical advice.
- Not a replacement for clinic staff. It covers new-inquiry follow-up so the front desk can stay focused on patients in the building.

## Who it is for
- Independent owner-operated dental practices running Google or Meta ads, or otherwise capturing inbound inquiries, for implants, Invisalign, cosmetic, or restorative work.
- Not a fit for DSOs, franchises, corporate dental groups, practices with no high-ticket services, or practices outside the US.

- Dental Lead Conversion Service (what AppointBridge does, pricing, who it's for): https://appoint-bridge.com/dental-lead-conversion-service/

- For Invisalign providers: https://appoint-bridge.com/for/invisalign-providers/
- For cosmetic & veneer practices: https://appoint-bridge.com/for/cosmetic-veneer-practices/

- The Dental Lead Response Playbook: https://appoint-bridge.com/guide/
- How Fast Should a Dental Practice Respond to a New Lead?: https://appoint-bridge.com/guide/how-fast-to-respond-to-dental-leads/

- A Follow-Up Cadence for High-Ticket Dental Consults: https://appoint-bridge.com/guide/dental-lead-follow-up-cadence/
- What Slow Lead Response Costs a Dental Practice: https://appoint-bridge.com/guide/cost-of-slow-lead-response/
